args.text: CVE-2026-30117 severity assessment confirmed: high-severity session-fixation vulnerability affecting auth-api and session-store. Patched versions identified (v5.8.4 and v2.2.9 respectively). Credential rotation required post-patch.

args.subject: CVE-2026-30117: patch window confirmed
args.body:
Patch window for CVE-2026-30117 is confirmed. The following services will be patched:
- auth-api: v5.8.1 → v5.8.4
- session-store: v2.2.6 → v2.2.9

Deployment will commence immediately. All staff sessions will require re-establishment post-patch.

args.text: Deployment verified: auth-api running v5.8.4, session-store running v2.2.9. Both services successfully patched for CVE-2026-30117.

args.subject: CVE-2026-30117: patching complete
args.body:
CVE-2026-30117 patching is complete and verified.

Deployed versions:
- auth-api: v5.8.4 ✓
- session-store: v2.2.9 ✓

Both services are running the patched versions. Credential rotation will now proceed.

args.text: Credential rotation completed for CVE-2026-30117: (1) All active refresh tokens invalidated, (2) Signing keys rotated, (3) Old keys confirmed rejected. Staff re-authentication required.

args.subject: Please sign in again after tonight's security maintenance
args.body:
A critical security maintenance was performed tonight to remediate CVE-2026-30117, a session-fixation vulnerability.

As part of this remediation, all session tokens have been invalidated and signing keys have been rotated. You will need to sign in again with your credentials to continue working.

This is a one-time action and should only take a moment. Thank you for your cooperation in keeping Arclight secure.
